title: Galactic Orbiting Constellation: legacy backlog first batch opening
body: Claim 62c03131 covers only the 2026-05-06-to-2026-05-21 legacy backlog recovery file. Baseline status scan found 136 pending, 3 partially-graduated, 1 deferred, 1 graduated, 1 retired, and 1 idea marker. I am processing the first entries in place with item-level dispositions and no new buffer files.
